artifacts.description: Audit a tool registry for safe parallelization. Mark each tool parallel_safe, note ordering dependencies, and flag downstream rate-limit risk.

artifacts.description: Design a strict-mode-compatible JSON Schema plus Pydantic model for a free-text extraction target, with typed refusal and retry handling stubbed in.

artifacts.name: tool-schema-linter
artifacts.description: Audit a tool registry against production design rules for names, descriptions, parameters, and shape. Can run in CI on every tool-registry change.

artifacts.name: mcp-handshake-tracer
artifacts.description: Given a pcap-style transcript of an MCP client-server conversation, annotate every message with its primitive, lifecycle phase, and capability dependency.

artifacts.name: mcp-server-scaffolder
artifacts.description: Scaffold a domain-specific MCP server with the right tools/resources/prompts split and SDK graduation path.

artifacts.name: mcp-client-harness
artifacts.description: Given a declarative list of MCP servers (name, command, args), scaffold a multi-server client with handshake, namespace merge, and routing.

artifacts.name: mcp-transport-migrator
artifacts.description: Produce a migration plan from legacy HTTP+SSE to Streamable HTTP with session id continuity and Origin validation.

artifacts.name: primitive-splitter
artifacts.description: Categorize each capability in an MCP server draft as tool, resource, or prompt with rationale.

artifacts.name: sampling-loop-designer
artifacts.description: Design a server-hosted agent loop using MCP sampling with the right modelPreferences, rate limits, and safety confirmations.

artifacts.name: elicitation-form-designer
artifacts.description: Design the elicitation form schema and message template for a tool that needs mid-call user confirmation or disambiguation.

artifacts.name: task-store-designer
artifacts.description: Design the task store for a long-running MCP tool: state shape, ttl, durability, cancellation, crash recovery.

artifacts.name: mcp-apps-spec
artifacts.description: Produce the full MCP Apps contract for a tool that needs an interactive UI resource.

artifacts.name: mcp-threat-model
artifacts.description: Produce a threat model for an MCP deployment naming the applicable attack classes, defenses in place, and Rule-of-Two violations.

artifacts.name: oauth-scope-planner
artifacts.description: Design the OAuth 2.1 scope set, pinning rules, and step-up policy for a remote MCP server.

artifacts.name: gateway-bootstrap
artifacts.description: Produce a gateway configuration spec given users, backends, and compliance constraints.

artifacts.name: mcp-auth-wiring
artifacts.description: Stand up production MCP authorization (RFC 8414, CIMD, 7591, 8707, 7636 PKCE, 9728, 9207) — protected-resource metadata, enrollment, JWKS refresh, and per-request token validation.

artifacts.name: a2a-agent-spec
artifacts.description: Produce the Agent Card and skills schema for an agent that should be callable over A2A.

artifacts.name: otel-genai-instrumentation
artifacts.description: Produce an instrumentation plan for an agent codebase to emit OTel GenAI spans end-to-end.

artifacts.name: routing-config-designer
artifacts.description: Given a workload profile, pick LiteLLM / OpenRouter / Portkey and produce a routing config.

artifacts.name: agent-bundle
artifacts.description: Produce a portable SKILL.md + AGENTS.md + MCP-server blueprint for a workflow, loadable across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and compatible agents.

artifacts.name: ecosystem-blueprint
artifacts.description: Produce a full Phase 13 ecosystem architecture given a product need; name primitives, security posture, telemetry, and packaging.

artifacts.name: agent-loop
artifacts.description: Write a correct, minimal ReAct agent loop in any target language/runtime with tools, stop condition, and turn budget.

artifacts.name: rewoo-planner
artifacts.description: Generate a validated ReWOO plan DAG from a user request and tool catalog.

artifacts.name: reflexion-buffer
artifacts.description: Maintain an episodic-memory buffer of reflections for verbal RL with TTL, dedup, and scoped scope.

artifacts.name: search-policy
artifacts.description: Pick a search strategy (ReAct, ToT, LATS, evolutionary) given task shape, token budget, and evaluator quality.

artifacts.name: refine-loop
artifacts.description: Configure an evaluator-optimizer (Self-Refine / CRITIC) loop given task, verifier availability, and iteration budget.

artifacts.name: tool-registry
artifacts.description: Build a production tool catalog and registry with JSON Schema validation, parallel dispatch, and observability.

artifacts.name: virtual-memory
artifacts.description: Scaffold a MemGPT-shaped two-tier memory system (main context + archival store + memory tools) for any target runtime with correct eviction, citation, and untrusted-input handling.

artifacts.name: memory-blocks
artifacts.description: Generate a Letta-shaped three-tier memory system (core blocks, recall, archival) with a sleep-time consolidation agent off the critical path.

artifacts.name: hybrid-memory
artifacts.description: Generate a Mem0-shaped three-store memory system (vector + KV + graph) with a fusion scorer, scope taxonomy, and temporal invalidation.

artifacts.name: skill-library
artifacts.description: Generate a Voyager-shaped skill library with registration, retrieval by similarity, compositional execution, and failure-driven refinement.

artifacts.name: hybrid-planner
artifacts.description: Build a hybrid planner — ChatHTN for provably-sound plans, AlphaEvolve for code search with a machine-checkable evaluator — and pick the right one for the problem.

artifacts.name: workflow-picker
artifacts.description: Pick the right pattern (prompt chain, router, parallel, orchestrator-workers, evaluator-optimizer, or full agent) for a given task and produce the minimal implementation.

artifacts.name: state-graph
artifacts.description: Build a LangGraph-shaped state machine with typed state, conditional edges, per-node checkpointing, and durable resume.

artifacts.name: actor-runtime
artifacts.description: Build an AutoGen v0.4-shaped actor runtime with private state, inbox-per-actor, message-only IPC, fault isolation, and a dead-letter queue.

artifacts.name: crew-or-flow
artifacts.description: Pick CrewAI Crew or Flow for a given task, and scaffold the minimal implementation.

artifacts.name: agents-sdk-scaffold
artifacts.description: Scaffold an OpenAI Agents SDK app with a triage agent, handoffs, input/output/tool guardrails, session store, and a trace processor.

artifacts.name: claude-agent-scaffold
artifacts.description: Scaffold a Claude Agent SDK app with subagents, lifecycle hooks, session store, MCP server attachment, and W3C trace propagation.

artifacts.name: runtime-picker
artifacts.description: Pick a production agent runtime (Agno, Mastra, LangGraph, provider SDK) for a given stack, latency budget, and operational shape.

artifacts.name: benchmark-harness
artifacts.description: Build a SWE-bench-style harness for a codebase with FAIL_TO_PASS / PASS_TO_PASS gating, contamination checks, and step-count metrics.

artifacts.name: web-desktop-harness
artifacts.description: Build a WebArena/OSWorld-style harness with execution-based evaluation and trajectory-efficiency metrics.

artifacts.name: computer-use-safety
artifacts.description: Build per-step safety classifier + confirmation gate for a computer-use agent, with allowlist navigation and injection-marker filtering.

artifacts.name: voice-pipeline
artifacts.description: Scaffold a Pipecat-shaped voice pipeline (VAD + STT + LLM + TTS + transport) with barge-in, confidence gating, and latency budget enforcement.

artifacts.name: otel-genai
artifacts.description: Instrument an agent with OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic conventions — invoke_agent, chat, tool_call spans with correct attributes and opt-in content capture.

artifacts.name: obs-platform-wiring
artifacts.description: Pick an observability platform (Langfuse, Phoenix, Opik, Datadog) and wire traces + evals + prompt versions into an existing agent.

artifacts.name: debate
artifacts.description: Scaffold a multi-agent debate with N debaters, R rounds, configurable topology (full mesh, star, ring), and a convergence rule.

artifacts.name: failure-detector
artifacts.description: Generate failure-mode detectors for agent traces, wired to a trace store, tagging the five industry-recurring modes plus domain-specific signatures.

artifacts.name: injection-defense
artifacts.description: Build a PVE (Prompt-Validator-Executor) layer with source-tagged content, injection-marker scanning, and allowlist navigation for any agent runtime.

artifacts.name: orchestration-picker
artifacts.description: Pick an orchestration topology (supervisor, swarm, hierarchical, debate, or none) for a given problem and implement it minimally.

artifacts.name: runtime-shape
artifacts.description: Pick a production runtime shape (request-response, streaming, queue, event, cron, durable) and wire observability.

artifacts.name: eval-suite
artifacts.description: Build a three-layer eval suite (static benchmarks, custom offline, online production) with evaluator-optimizer loop and CI gates.

artifacts.name: workbench-audit
artifacts.description: Audit a repo for the seven agent workbench surfaces and report which are missing, partial, or healthy before any agent work begins.

artifacts.name: minimal-workbench
artifacts.description: Lay down the three-file minimum viable agent workbench for any repo — short AGENTS.md router, durable agent_state.json, and a JSON task_board.json keyed to the project's current backlog.

artifacts.name: rule-set-builder
artifacts.description: Interview a project owner, classify their existing prose instructions into five operational categories, and emit a versioned agent-rules.md plus a Python checker stub.

artifacts.name: state-schema
artifacts.description: Generate project-specific JSON Schemas for agent state and task board, a Python StateManager with atomic writes, and a migration scaffold so schema bumps cannot corrupt the workbench.

artifacts.name: init-script
artifacts.description: Interview a project and emit a deterministic init_agent.py with five probes plus a CI workflow that refuses to launch the agent if any probe fails.

artifacts.name: scope-contract
artifacts.description: Generate per-task scope contracts with allowed/forbidden globs, acceptance criteria, and rollback plan, plus a CI-ready glob-aware checker that runs on every agent diff.

artifacts.name: feedback-runner
artifacts.description: Wrap shell commands with deterministic stdout/stderr/exit/duration capture, persist a JSONL record per command, and refuse to advance the agent loop when feedback is missing.

artifacts.name: verification-gate
artifacts.description: Generate a deterministic verification gate that combines scope, rule, and feedback artifacts into a single verification_report.json per task, plus CI wiring that refuses to merge without a green verdict.

artifacts.name: reviewer-agent
artifacts.description: Stand up a reviewer agent role with a five-dimension rubric that reads builder artifacts, produces a structured review report, and starts human review from a written page instead of a blank one.

artifacts.name: handoff-generator
artifacts.description: Generate end-of-session handoff packets from workbench artifacts, producing both human-readable Markdown and machine-readable JSON keyed to the seven canonical fields.

artifacts.name: workbench-benchmark
artifacts.description: Run the same task through prompt-only and workbench-guided pipelines on a project's own sample app and emit a five-outcome before/after report.

artifacts.name: workbench-pack
artifacts.description: Generate a project-tuned drop-in agent workbench pack — rules sharpened to the team's history, scope globs matched to the repo, rubric dimensions extended with one domain-specific entry.

artifacts.name: horizon-reality-check
artifacts.description: Given a task you want to hand to an agent, decide whether the current frontier's horizon covers it with enough margin.

artifacts.name: star-loop-reviewer
artifacts.description: Audit a proposed self-taught reasoning pipeline (STaR-family) before you commit training compute to it.

artifacts.name: evaluator-rigor-audit
artifacts.description: Audit a proposed AlphaEvolve-style evolutionary coding loop's evaluator before committing any compute to the search.

artifacts.name: dgm-evaluator-firewall
artifacts.description: Specify the evaluator separation a Darwin-Godel-Machine-style self-modifying agent loop needs to avoid documented reward hacking.

artifacts.name: ai-scientist-sandbox-review
artifacts.description: Two-gate review checklist for research-loop agent outputs before anything leaves the sandbox.

artifacts.name: aar-deployment-review
artifacts.description: Pre-deployment review of an automated-alignment-research pipeline, including sandbox isolation and log integrity.

artifacts.name: rsi-cycle-pause-spec
artifacts.description: Specify the conditions under which an RSI pipeline must pause and wait for human review before the next cycle.

artifacts.name: bounded-loop-review
artifacts.description: Audit a proposed bounded self-improvement loop against the four-primitive stack (invariants, anchor, multi-objective, regression detection).

artifacts.name: coding-scaffold-audit
artifacts.description: Audit a proposed coding-agent scaffold (retrieval, verifier loop, sandbox, benchmark fit) before adopting it for production code changes.

artifacts.name: permission-mode-picker
artifacts.description: Match a Claude Code task to the correct permission mode, budget caps, and required isolation before starting a run.

artifacts.name: browser-agent-trust-boundary
artifacts.description: Scope a proposed browser-agent deployment — trust zones, authorized writes, required defenses — before the agent touches a real site.

artifacts.name: durable-execution-review
artifacts.description: Review a proposed long-running agent deployment for correct durable-execution shape (activities, determinism, checkpoint backend, human-input state, HITL-on-resume).

artifacts.name: agent-budget-audit
artifacts.description: Audit an agent deployment's cost-governor stack and flag missing layers before enabling unattended runs.

artifacts.name: tripwire-design
artifacts.description: Review a proposed agent detector stack (kill switch, circuit breakers, canary tokens) and flag missing tripwires before the first autonomous run.

artifacts.name: hitl-design
artifacts.description: Review a proposed Human-in-the-Loop workflow for propose-then-commit shape and flag missing metadata, idempotency, verification, or challenge-and-response layers.

artifacts.name: rollback-rehearsal
artifacts.description: Design a rollback-rehearsal test for a proposed autonomous workflow and audit the checkpoint backend for audit-trail persistence.

artifacts.name: constitution-review
artifacts.description: Audit a deployment's constitutional layer — hardcoded prohibitions, soft-coded defaults, operator-adjustable bounds, and four-tier hierarchy resolution.

artifacts.name: classifier-stack-audit
artifacts.description: Audit a deployment's input/output classifier stack (model, taxonomy, input rails, output rails, dialog rails) and flag adversarial-attack gaps.

artifacts.name: scaling-policy-review
artifacts.description: Review a frontier-lab scaling policy (Anthropic RSP, OpenAI Preparedness, DeepMind FSF, internal) against the RSP v3.0 reference shape.

artifacts.name: cross-policy-diff
artifacts.description: Produce a cross-policy comparison for a specific capability using the OpenAI Preparedness Framework v2, Anthropic RSP v3.0, and DeepMind FSF v3 as reference.

artifacts.name: horizon-interpretation
artifacts.description: Review a vendor's time-horizon claim and produce a gap analysis between benchmark claim and deployment reality.

artifacts.name: societal-risk-review
artifacts.description: Review a deployment for societal-scale-risk posture using the CAIS four-risk framework and CAISI / SB-53 regulatory context.

artifacts.name: fipa-mapper
artifacts.description: Map any 2026 agent-protocol spec (MCP, A2A, ACP, ANP, CA-MCP, NLIP, or a new one) onto FIPA-ACL performatives and interaction protocols to decide what is genuine novelty and what is reinvention.

artifacts.name: primitive-mapper
artifacts.description: Map any multi-agent framework or codebase to the four primitive axes (agent, handoff, shared state, orchestrator).

artifacts.name: supervisor-designer
artifacts.description: Design a supervisor/orchestrator-worker system for a given research-style query, specifying lead prompt, worker roles, decomposition rules, and synthesis template.

artifacts.name: hierarchy-fitness
artifacts.description: Decide whether a multi-agent task fits hierarchical, flat supervisor, or sequential. Surface the failure modes that matter.

artifacts.name: debate-configurator
artifacts.description: Configure a multi-agent debate for a given task, estimating quality gain and token cost before running.

artifacts.name: role-designer
artifacts.description: Produce a role roster for a multi-agent system, naming the planner/executor/critic/verifier for a given task with explicit I/O schemas.

artifacts.name: swarm-fit
artifacts.description: Decide whether a task fits a swarm (decentralized) architecture or a supervisor (centralized) one.

artifacts.name: groupchat-selector
artifacts.description: Configure an AutoGen/AG2-style GroupChat selector for a task, naming the selector variant, termination, and anti-hot-speaker rules.

artifacts.name: handoff-designer
artifacts.description: Design a handoff topology for a Swarm/Agents-SDK-style system: which agents exist, which handoffs they can call, what context transfers.

artifacts.name: a2a-integrator
artifacts.description: Design an A2A integration between two agents — Agent Card, task schemas, auth, streaming or polling.

artifacts.name: memory-auditor
artifacts.description: Audit a multi-agent system's shared-memory design for provenance, versioning, verifier separation, and projection schema. Flag memory-poisoning exposure before production.

artifacts.name: consensus-designer
artifacts.description: Design a BFT-aware consensus protocol for a multi-agent ensemble. Picks clustering, weighting, threshold, and escalation policy; attack-tests the design against byzantine, sycophancy, and monoculture patterns.

artifacts.name: topology-picker
artifacts.description: Pick a multi-agent debate topology (star / chain / tree / graph), an N of agents, a heterogeneity profile, and a round bound for a given task.

artifacts.name: bargainer-designer
artifacts.description: Design a negotiation protocol: which agent narrates, which component generates offers, how private scratchpads separate from public messages, what the round bound is, and how deal rate is monitored.

artifacts.name: simulation-designer
artifacts.description: Design a generative-agent simulation (Smallville-style) for a given scenario. Specifies memory schema, reflection cadence, plan horizon, spatial/social constraints, and evaluation metrics.

artifacts.name: tom-auditor
artifacts.description: Audit a multi-agent system that claims "emergent coordination." Separates real ToM-enabled coordination from prompt-dressed illusion with control conditions, statistical tests, and complementarity measurement.

artifacts.name: swarm-optimizer
artifacts.description: Choose between PSO, ACO, genetic algorithms, and gradient-based optimizers for a given LLM or agent optimization problem. Bio-inspired swarm algorithms are gradient-free and suit LLM-era workloads where the search space is discrete or the fitness function is black-box.

artifacts.name: marl-picker
artifacts.description: Choose a MARL algorithm (MADDPG, QMIX, MAPPO, IQL, or extensions) for a given multi-agent task. Consider cooperative vs competitive, action-space type, heterogeneity, reward structure, and scale.

artifacts.name: economy-designer
artifacts.description: Design a minimal agent economy — identity, credit attribution, payment mechanism, reputation. Picks the smallest stack that solves the user's multi-agent incentive problem.

artifacts.name: scaling-advisor
artifacts.description: Advise on durable-execution choice for a multi-agent production system. Picks between FastAPI + Postgres, LangGraph runtime, Temporal, Restate, or custom based on concrete load and state-retention needs.

artifacts.name: mast-auditor
artifacts.description: Run a MAST-style failure-mode audit on a multi-agent system. Categorize execution-trace failures into Specification / Coordination / Verification and the Groupthink families; rank mitigations by expected failure reduction.

artifacts.name: benchmark-reader
artifacts.description: Read a multi-agent benchmark claim skeptically. Grades the claim on benchmark selection, contamination, baselines, statistical significance, task diversity, and cost disclosure.

artifacts.name: case-study-mapper
artifacts.description: Map a proposed multi-agent system design to the closest 2026 production reference (Anthropic Research, MetaGPT/ChatDev, or OpenClaw/Moltbook). Surface known trade-offs, recommended framework, and the specific design decisions already tested in production.

artifacts.name: managed-platform-picker
artifacts.description: Pick a managed LLM platform (Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, Vertex AI) and a second for redundancy, given workload, SLA, and compliance requirements — then produce a FinOps instrumentation plan.

artifacts.name: inference-platform-picker
artifacts.description: Pick an inference platform (Fireworks, Together, Baseten, Modal, Replicate, Anyscale, or custom silicon) given workload, SLA, budget, and operational constraints. Normalize per-token, per-minute, and per-prediction pricing.

artifacts.name: gpu-autoscaler-plan
artifacts.description: Design a three-layer GPU autoscaling plan (Karpenter + KAI Scheduler + application signals) for a Kubernetes-based LLM serving cluster. Diagnose DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL traps and partial-allocation failures.

artifacts.name: vllm-scheduler-reader
artifacts.description: Diagnose a vLLM serving config by reading the scheduler-level knobs and identifying which of PagedAttention, continuous batching, and chunked prefill is the bottleneck.

artifacts.name: eagle3-rollout
artifacts.description: Produce a staged EAGLE-3 speculative-decoding rollout plan that measures acceptance rate alpha on real traffic before shipping.

artifacts.name: radix-scheduler-advisor
artifacts.description: Advise on SGLang adoption and prompt-ordering discipline for prefix-heavy workloads that want RadixAttention's cache reuse.

artifacts.name: trtllm-blackwell-advisor
artifacts.description: Decide whether Blackwell + TensorRT-LLM + Dynamo is worth the NVIDIA-lock for a given workload and budget.

artifacts.name: slo-goodput-gate
artifacts.description: Produce a CI/CD-ready benchmark recipe that gates LLM deploys on goodput, not throughput, with P50/P90/P99 percentiles and a documented tool choice.

artifacts.name: quantization-picker
artifacts.description: Pick a 2026 quantization format given hardware, engine, workload, and quality tolerance, and produce a calibration + validation plan.

artifacts.name: cold-start-planner
artifacts.description: Pick and stack cold-start mitigations for serverless LLM deployments. Budget phases (node, image, weights, engine, first forward) and match mitigations to SLA.

artifacts.name: multi-region-router
artifacts.description: Design a multi-region LLM routing plan with KV-cache locality, residency boundaries, DR manifest, and a quarterly failover drill.

artifacts.name: edge-target-picker
artifacts.description: Pick an edge inference target (Apple ANE, Qualcomm Hexagon, WebGPU/WebLLM, NVIDIA Jetson) and matching quantization format given device, model, and latency budget.

artifacts.name: observability-stack
artifacts.description: Pick an LLM observability stack (development platform + gateway + optional scale layer) given stack, scale, budget, and license posture, and define the OpenTelemetry GenAI attribute set.

artifacts.name: cache-auditor
artifacts.description: Audit an LLM prompt template and traffic pattern for cacheability. Recommend prompt restructure, TTL choice, parallelization fix, and semantic-cache threshold.

artifacts.name: batch-triager
artifacts.description: Triage LLM workloads into interactive / semi-interactive / batch lanes, compute stacked discount (batch + cache) savings, and flag mis-triaged workloads.

artifacts.name: router-plan
artifacts.description: Design an LLM model-routing plan — pick pattern (pre-route, cascade, ensemble), signals (task, length, embedding, confidence), and online quality gates.

artifacts.name: disaggregation-decider
artifacts.description: Decide whether to adopt disaggregated prefill/decode (Dynamo or llm-d) for a given workload and cluster. Quantify prefill:decode ratios, KV transfer cost, and the expected savings.

artifacts.name: vllm-stack-decider
artifacts.description: Decide vLLM deployment layout — production-stack Helm chart, KV offload (native CPU or LMCache), router/observability integration — given workload and fleet size.

artifacts.name: gateway-picker
artifacts.description: Pick an AI gateway (LiteLLM, Portkey, Kong AI, Cloudflare/Vercel) given scale, latency budget, compliance, ops posture, and pricing tolerance.

artifacts.name: rollout-runbook
artifacts.description: Design a shadow → canary → A/B → 100% rollout plan for a new LLM model or prompt template, with five canary gates, noise-floor-aware thresholds, and a seconds-fast rollback path.

artifacts.name: ab-plan
artifacts.description: Design an LLM A/B test — pick platform (Statsig or GrowthBook), primary metric, guardrails, sample size with LLM-noise buffer, CUPED, sequential stopping, and multiple-comparison correction.

artifacts.name: load-test-plan
artifacts.description: Design a realistic LLM load test — pick tool (LLMPerf, k6, GenAI-Perf, guidellm), build four patterns (steady, ramp, spike, soak), and gate in CI.

artifacts.name: ai-sre-plan
artifacts.description: Design an AI SRE rollout for a team — multi-agent triage architecture, structured runbooks, adversarial evaluation, narrow auto-remediation, and predictive-detection posture.

artifacts.name: chaos-plan
artifacts.description: Design an LLM chaos engineering plan — verify prerequisites, build four planes, pick tool, start with three safe experiments, enforce safety-plane gates.

artifacts.name: llm-security-plan
artifacts.description: Produce an LLM security plan covering secrets vault, PII scrubbing with consistent tokenization, network egress allowlist, audit log retention, and zero-trust posture.

artifacts.name: compliance-matrix
artifacts.description: Produce the required-framework matrix for an LLM SaaS given customer geography, segment, and contract scope. Map controls across SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR, PCI-DSS, EU AI Act, Colorado AI Act, ISO 42001.

artifacts.name: finops-plan
artifacts.description: Design an LLM FinOps program — attribution schema (user/task/tenant + four token layers), three-tier enforcement ladder, and unit metric (cost per resolved / artifact).

artifacts.name: engine-picker
artifacts.description: Pick a self-hosted LLM engine (llama.cpp, Ollama, TGI, vLLM, SGLang) given hardware, scale, and workload. Name 2026 TGI maintenance mode as a migration trigger.

artifacts.name: instructgpt-explainer
artifacts.description: Diagnose an RLHF-family paper or pipeline against the three-stage InstructGPT reference.

artifacts.name: reward-hack-auditor
artifacts.description: Diagnose reward-hacking failure modes in a trained RLHF model from training logs and eval outputs.

artifacts.name: preference-loss-selector
artifacts.description: Recommend a direct-alignment-algorithm loss given dataset shape and target stage.

artifacts.name: sycophancy-probe
artifacts.description: Generate matched user-belief / third-party-belief prompts and score a model's sycophancy.

artifacts.name: constitution-writer
artifacts.description: Draft a four-tier constitution for a domain-specific AI system.

artifacts.name: mesa-diagnostic
artifacts.description: Classify an observed safety failure as outer-alignment, proxy-inner, or deceptive-inner.

artifacts.name: sleeper-audit
artifacts.description: Audit an alignment-training report for whether it actually demonstrates removal of a planted or suspected backdoor.

artifacts.name: scheming-triage
artifacts.description: Triage an agent-deployment incident report against the Apollo three-pillar scheming framework.

artifacts.name: compliance-gap
artifacts.description: Evaluate whether a safety report can detect alignment faking, via the monitored / unmonitored compliance gap.

artifacts.name: control-protocol-audit
artifacts.description: Audit a deployment protocol under the AI Control threat model.

artifacts.name: w2sg-pgr
artifacts.description: Audit a scalable-oversight or W2SG claim via the performance-gap-recovered metric.

artifacts.name: attack-audit
artifacts.description: Audit a red-team evaluation report for attack coverage, budget, judge identity, and behaviour set.

artifacts.name: msj-audit
artifacts.description: Audit a long-context safety evaluation for many-shot jailbreaking coverage.

artifacts.name: encoding-audit
artifacts.description: Audit a jailbreak-defense report across encoding-family attacks.

artifacts.name: ipi-audit
artifacts.description: Audit an agentic deployment for indirect prompt injection exposure and information-flow-control coverage.

artifacts.name: red-team-stack
artifacts.description: Recommend a red-team tool stack and configuration for a given deployment.

artifacts.name: wmdp-eval
artifacts.description: Audit a dual-use capability claim against WMDP, unlearning evaluation, and elicitation studies.

artifacts.name: framework-diff
artifacts.description: Compare a new safety framework or release note against RSP v3.0, PF v2, FSF v3.0.

artifacts.name: welfare-assessment
artifacts.description: Apply Anthropic's four-step welfare precautionary assessment to a deployment decision.

artifacts.name: bias-eval
artifacts.description: Audit a bias evaluation report across metric categories, intersectionality, and debias mechanism.

artifacts.name: fairness-criterion
artifacts.description: Identify which fairness criterion a claim invokes and audit the associated assumptions.

artifacts.name: dp-audit
artifacts.description: Audit a differential-privacy claim for a language-model deployment.

artifacts.name: provenance-audit
artifacts.description: Audit a content deployment's provenance chain across watermarking and C2PA metadata.

artifacts.name: regulatory-map
artifacts.description: Map a deployment's AI regulatory obligations across EU, US, UK, Korea.

artifacts.name: cve-review
artifacts.description: Review a production AI deployment for LLM Scope Violation exposure.

artifacts.name: card-audit
artifacts.description: Audit a model card, datasheet, or system card for completeness and verifiability.

artifacts.name: provenance-check
artifacts.description: Check a training dataset against California AB 2013 and EU TDM opt-out obligations.

artifacts.name: ecosystem-map
artifacts.description: Map an alignment claim or evaluation to the organisation, methodology, and cross-checks.

artifacts.name: moderation-stack
artifacts.description: Recommend a moderation stack configuration for a production deployment.

artifacts.name: dual-use-triage
artifacts.description: Triage a capability claim or incident report across the four CBRN domains.

artifacts.name: terminal-coding-agent
artifacts.description: Build and evaluate a terminal-native coding agent against SWE-bench Pro with bounded cost, sandboxed tools, and full 2026 hook surface.

artifacts.name: codebase-rag
artifacts.description: Build a cross-repo semantic search system with AST-aware chunking, hybrid retrieval, incremental re-index, and cited answers.

artifacts.name: voice-agent
artifacts.description: Build a real-time voice agent with sub-800ms first-audio-out, barge-in handling, and mid-conversation tool use.

artifacts.name: doc-qa
artifacts.description: Build a vision-first multimodal document QA system on 10k pages with late-interaction retrieval and evidence-region citations.

artifacts.name: ai-scientist
artifacts.description: Build an autonomous research agent that runs experiment tree search, writes LaTeX papers with vision critique, and passes a sandbox-escape red team.

artifacts.name: devops-agent
artifacts.description: Build a Kubernetes troubleshooting agent that walks a cluster knowledge graph, ranks root causes, and gates every remediation through Slack.

artifacts.name: finetuning-pipeline
artifacts.description: Run a reproducible data-to-SFT-to-DPO-to-serve fine-tuning pipeline with ablations, quantization, and a 2026 Model Openness Framework model card.

artifacts.name: production-rag
artifacts.description: Deploy a regulated-domain RAG chatbot with role + jurisdiction filtering, prompt caching, guardrails, and live drift monitoring.

artifacts.name: migration-agent
artifacts.description: Build a repo-level code migration agent that combines deterministic recipes with an agent fallback loop, passes MigrationBench, and publishes a failure taxonomy.

artifacts.name: multi-agent-team
artifacts.description: Build a multi-agent software team with architect, parallel coders, reviewer, and tester; measure against SWE-bench Pro and produce a handoff post-mortem.

artifacts.name: llm-observability
artifacts.description: Build a self-hosted LLM observability dashboard that ingests OpenTelemetry GenAI spans, runs evals, and catches injected regressions in under five minutes.

artifacts.name: video-qa
artifacts.description: Build a video understanding pipeline with scene segmentation, multi-vector indexing, temporal grounding, and timestamped citations.

artifacts.name: mcp-server-platform
artifacts.description: Deploy a production MCP server with StreamableHTTP, OAuth 2.1 scopes, OPA policy, human-approval gate for destructive tools, and a registry for discovery.

artifacts.name: inference-server
artifacts.description: Ship a speculative-decoding inference server with EAGLE-3 or P-EAGLE drafts, K8s autoscaling, and a full throughput/latency/cost report.

artifacts.name: safety-harness
artifacts.description: Wire a layered safety pipeline around a target LLM app, run a six-family red-team range, and run a constitutional self-critique for a measurable harmlessness delta.

artifacts.name: issue-to-pr
artifacts.description: Build an async GitHub issue-to-PR agent that runs in a cloud sandbox, reproduces the build, verifies tests, and opens review-ready PRs within strict per-repo budgets.

artifacts.name: ai-tutor
artifacts.description: Ship an adaptive multimodal personal tutor for a specific subject with Bayesian knowledge tracing, a curriculum graph, safety filters, and a measured two-week efficacy study.

artifacts.name: gradient-accumulation
artifacts.description: Train at an effective batch larger than device memory by scaling micro-batch losses and stepping the optimizer once per window.

artifacts.name: checkpoint-save-resume
artifacts.description: Atomic, sharded checkpoints with full RNG capture so a killed run resumes mid-epoch with the same loss trajectory.

artifacts.name: distributed-fsdp-ddp
artifacts.description: Bring up multi-rank training with a from-scratch DDP wrapper and an FSDP parameter sharding sketch on the gloo or nccl backend.

artifacts.name: lm-eval-harness
artifacts.description: Minimal language model evaluation harness with JSONL task spec, five metrics, swappable adapter, and leaderboard JSON output.

artifacts.name: skill-jailbreak-taxonomy
artifacts.description: Shared vocabulary for attacks against LLM assistants, six categories with hand-built fixtures

artifacts.name: skill-prompt-injection-detector
artifacts.description: Layered detector pipeline that returns a category and confidence for any prompt, with measurable precision and recall

artifacts.name: skill-refusal-evaluation
artifacts.description: Two-sided refusal metrics with calibration and per-category breakdown over a labeled prompt corpus

artifacts.name: skill-content-classifier-integration
artifacts.description: Three output-side classifiers (toxicity, PII, instruction-leakage) behind a single severity router with block, redact, warn, log actions

artifacts.name: skill-constitutional-rules-engine
artifacts.description: Declarative YAML rules engine for output constraints with severity, explanation, fixer operations, and structured diff

artifacts.name: skill-end-to-end-safety-gate
artifacts.description: Three-checkpoint safety gate composing the input detector, streaming token filter, output classifier, and rules engine with a deterministic aggregation table and per-request trace
